name: IFS Cloud ERP API
what_it_does: IFS Cloud REST API for enterprise ERP platform with strong field service management and asset lifecycle. Enables AI agents to manage manufacturing and production workflows, handle work order and field service management, access project and engineering management data, retrieve supply chain and procurement data, manage asset lifecycle and maintenance management, handle financial and accounting operations, access defense and aerospace compliance data (AS9100, ITAR), retrieve HR and workforce management data, manage customer and CRM data, and integrate enterprise operations with MES, IoT, and industry-specific platforms.
use_cases: Managing field service and work orders from enterprise service automation agents
Accessing manufacturing and production data from industrial automation agents
Retrieving asset lifecycle and maintenance data from equipment management agents
Integrating defense and aerospace project data from compliance automation agents
not_for: SMB businesses without enterprise ERP and field service complexity
Retail and consumer without manufacturing and asset-intensive operations
Simple accounting without enterprise-scale ERP and field service management
best_when: An aerospace, defense, energy, construction, or service-intensive enterprise using IFS Cloud wants AI agents to automate field service management, asset maintenance, manufacturing operations, project management, and industry-specific compliance workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Enterprise ERP transactions affect financial records and operations. Defense and aerospace (AS9100, ITAR) automation must maintain regulatory compliance. Field service dispatch automation must respect safety protocols. Asset maintenance decisions for critical equipment require engineer oversight.

auth.notes: IFS uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with ERP, FSM, and project scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for ERP events. IFS Connect for enterprise integration. Strong partner ecosystem. OData API for reporting and analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise ERP pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and module enterprise pricing; annual contracts; implementation
pricing.notes: Linköping, Sweden. Private equity owned (EQT). Founded 1983. Enterprise ERP for asset and service-intensive industries. $800M+ revenue. Used by 10,000+ companies globally. Strong aerospace, defense, energy, and utilities verticals. IFS Cloud is SaaS platform. Competes with SAP and Oracle for manufacturing ERP. Market leader for field service management.

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP transactions affect financial records and operational commitments
ITAR compliance — defense product data requires US person export controls and access restrictions
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal and partner ecosystem
AS9100 quality management — aerospace quality data requires traceability and audit trails
Field service dispatch for safety-critical equipment — automation must maintain safety validation
IFS Connect integration platform — enterprise integrations typically go through Connect, not direct API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise ERP and defense data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, AS9100, ITAR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Defense and aerospace.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise ERP data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, ITAR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Aerospace and defense compliance.
